entries.source_text: Zero stale CURRENT-STATE assertions in the living doc set; every surviving grep hit dispositioned as historical narrative
scenarios: stale current-state assertion is detected and fails the scan
historical narrative is exempt and dispositioned
clean docs pass the scan after a refresh
acceptance_criteria: python tests/bug-fix-docs-currency-v3-39-1/check_docs_current.py exits 0 with zero violations (the B1/B2 replication artifact re-run verbatim — the regression contract)
the scan's exemption report lists every historical hit with its disposition

entries.source_text: Every stated current count matches the verified v3.39.1 state (5494 passing + 4 skipped, 200 test files, 48 skills / 39 agents / 23 commands); if the verified run diverges, docs carry the verified number
scenarios: clean docs pass the scan after a refresh
acceptance_criteria: the scan's count-verification section confirms stated counts == verified counts

entries.source_text: The full pytest suite is green under BOTH Windows cp1252 AND PYTHONUTF8=1
scenarios: clean docs pass the scan after a refresh
acceptance_criteria: python -m pytest -q green under cp1252 (expected 5494 passing + 4 skipped)
verification_artifacts: pytest suite output (captured in review evidence)

entries.source_text: The commit lands on architect-team/docs-currency-v3-39-1, merges --no-ff to main, pushes to origin/main
scenarios: clean docs pass the scan after a refresh
acceptance_criteria: git log shows the --no-ff merge commit on main; origin/main updated

playwright_authorization: N/A — no frontend surface in scope (docs-only PATCH on a plugin repo with no UI); the refined brief and this record are the explicit authorization per Phase 1's N/A convention
notes: Bug-fix change (Phase B3 slim gate). The replication artifact IS the acceptance test per bug-fix-pipeline discipline. Historical-narrative exemption and frozen-doc exclusion are user-authorized (refinement iterations 1-2).
